statement: In every magma, Equation 3153 (`x = (((y * y) * y) * y) * y`) implies Equation 4539 (`x * (y * z) = (y * w) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0873
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op y y) y) y) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op y w) u)
